narrative:
Sunbury City has 5,234 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
